profile.name: Ramadan Shemsu Hussen
bio: Machine learning engineer and researcher building production AI systems. Studying Computer Engineering at Hacettepe University (2022–2026).
My work spans LLM pipelines and RAG architectures, edge AI deployment, and computer vision — from document intelligence at the UN to TensorRT-optimized object detection on NVIDIA Jetson devices.
Currently conducting undergraduate research on hardware-aware edge AI optimization for UAV-based search-and-rescue. Published at ICHORA 2026, Ankara.
profile.quote: Simplicity is a great virtue but it requires hard work to achieve it and education to appreciate it.
profile.currentWork: Undergraduate researcher at Hacettepe BAP — optimizing YOLO/RT-DETR on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano for thermal UAV search-and-rescue. Also: generative AI research intern at UNDP SDG AI Lab.

contact.intro: Open to research collaborations, ML engineering roles, and interesting projects. Best reached by email.

books.title: Gödel, Escher, Bach: An Eternal Golden Braid
books.author: Douglas Hofstadter
books.notes: Strange loops through mathematics, music, and mind. The book that made me fall in love with recursion and formal systems.

books.title: The Order of Time
books.author: Carlo Rovelli
books.notes: Physics meets poetry. Rovelli makes thermal time feel personal.

books.title: The Alignment Problem
books.author: Brian Christian
books.notes: What it means to build AI that does what we actually want. Terrifying and essential.

books.title: Crime and Punishment
books.author: Fyodor Dostoevsky
books.notes: Raskolnikov's psychology is as vivid as any model's decision boundary. Literature's answer to the alignment problem.

books.title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
books.author: Daniel Kahneman
books.notes: System 1 vs System 2. Cognitive bias as the original adversarial examples.

experiences.title: Undergraduate Researcher
experiences.details: Hardware-aware edge AI optimization for real-time UAV-based search-and-rescue. Benchmarked 14 detector variants (YOLO v5–v11, RT-DETR, RF-DETR) across 278 configurations on the WiSARD thermal dataset. TensorRT FP16 is the highest-impact optimization. Published at ICHORA 2026.

experiences.title: Generative AI Research Intern
experiences.details: Production LLM pipelines for document analysis, QA, and stakeholder intelligence. Sole developer of the AI Stakeholder Mapping Tool — Django, Next.js, PostgreSQL/pgvector, Celery, Redis — with NER, semantic search, RAG-based summarization, and NL query interface for policy document analysis at scale.

experiences.title: Computer Vision Engineer
experiences.details: End-to-end CV workflows for solar panel defect detection using multi-modal drone imagery (IR, EL, RGB). Trained CNN models for field deployment. Automated defect detection and reporting pipelines.

experiences.title: Frontend Development Engineer
experiences.details: Frontend components for a multi-region education platform. Integrated REST APIs and role-based authentication workflows.

experiences.title: Computer Vision Engineer
experiences.details: Real-time driver and steering wheel detection (YOLO, Faster R-CNN) for edge inference. Labeled and augmented datasets for varied conditions.

experiences.title: Data Science Researcher
experiences.company: ORSAM — Center for Middle Eastern Studies
experiences.details: Sentiment and discourse analysis on Arabic social media datasets. NLP pipelines and interaction networks to identify influencers and propagation patterns.
